location: Rare (4%) drop from a single Fire Monk enemy hidden inside the Giant-Conquering Hero's Grave in the Mountaintops of the Giants. From the entrance grace, head downstairs and through an illusory wall on the right into a corridor with a moving flame trap; the Fire Monk waits in a cubby beyond it.
tactics: Only one Fire Monk carrying this weapon exists in the entire game, tucked in a side room off the dungeon's opening corridor
Margit's Shackle can freeze the corridor's moving flame trap in place so you can slip past unburned
With just a 4% drop chance from a single enemy, this is widely considered one of the hardest weapons to farm in the base game — rest and re-fight repeatedly
Don't confuse this Fire Monk with the Blackflame Monks in the Divine Tower of Caelid — those enemies also wield this weapon visually but do not drop it
lore: A curved sword etched with a flickering flame motif, carried by the Fire Monks native to the Mountaintops of the Giants. Their order is said to have chased a fugitive who stole their sacred flame all the way down into Liurnia.

builds.name: DEX-leaning quality
builds.why: D/D scaling that favors Dexterity slightly, on one of the lightest curved greatswords, suits a fast quality build over a pure-STR one
